tips.reminder.title: Reminder
tips.reminder.body: These scripts are starting points, not formulas. Your child's specific history, temperament, and relationship with you matter more than any script. When in doubt, fewer words and more listening.
tips.redFlags.warning: If you see these — don't wait, call a professional.

setup.error.notFound: No backend found on the local network. Make sure it is running.
